content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Lucky Sum of Digits". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/109/A
content.outputFormat: The lucky sum of digits of the given number

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Calculate the sum of digits and check if it's lucky (i.e., it contains only 4's and 7's)

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
sum_of_digits = 0
while n > 0:
    sum_of_digits += n % 10
    n //= 10
print(sum_of_digits)
